content: For PIX BR Code EMV static QR generation in the browser: pix-utils v2.8.2 (npm, MIT, last published ~4 months ago) is the most actively maintained library — parses, generates and validates PIX payments including static codes. qrcode-pix v5.0.0 exists but was last updated ~4 years ago and less maintained. qrcode npm v1.5.4 provides QR image rendering (Canvas/SVG) to display the generated payload. Recommended: pix-utils for BR Code EMV payload generation + qrcode for image rendering.
